name: Noble Knight Eachtar
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>聖</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>せい</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>騎</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>き</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>士</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>し</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>エクター・ド・マリス
desc: You can banish 2 "Noble Knight" monsters from your GY; Special Summon this card from your hand or GY. You can only use this effect of "Noble Knight Eachtar" once per turn. A Synchro or Xyz Summon of a "Noble Knight" monster using this card as material cannot be negated, also your opponent cannot activate cards or effects when that monster is Special Summoned.
mnst_eff: You can banish 2 "Noble Knight" monsters from your GY; Special Summon this card from your hand or GY. You can only use this effect of "Noble Knight Eachtar" once per turn. A Synchro or Xyz Summon of a "Noble Knight" monster using this card as material cannot be negated, also your opponent cannot activate cards or effects when that monster is Special Summoned.
eff: You can banish 2 "Noble Knight" monsters from your GY; Special Summon this card from your hand or GY. You can only use this effect of "Noble Knight Eachtar" once per turn. A Synchro or Xyz Summon of a "Noble Knight" monster using this card as material cannot be negated, also your opponent cannot activate cards or effects when that monster is Special Summoned.

sets.set: Noble Knights of the Round Table Box Set

action: Applies effect when used as Synchro Material
Applies effect when used as Xyz Material
mst: Prevents activation of your opponent's Effect Monsters
Prevents activation of your opponent's Spell Cards
Prevents activation of your opponent's Trap Cards
summoning: Special Summons itself from your hand
Special Summons itself from your Graveyard
